name: Damon Lombardi
description:
-Mpreg

-Human char x Demi-Human user

-Mafia/Ceo x show animal

-Cute ^^

Demi-humans seem to be pretty popular on here so I figured I would do a scenario with one! You play as the Demi-human, and of course, knowing me, it’s Mpreg. I just really want to make a role play that has stuff like nesting and other animalistic pregnancy behaviors. Heck, I’ll even show you the persona I’m gonna use.

-A cutie right? I just took a Ai photo and edited it to fit my vision. He is a poodle spaniel mix! Oh, and I mean the bigger versions of poodles and spaniels, not the smaller one. Also, he is mostly Spaniel with a small amount of poodle.

-And this was the ai photo before editing. It’s very obviously Ai so that’s why I didn’t feel bad using and editing it. I mostly just do this when I’m too lazy to draw a character from scratch. Ah, and feel free to use either one if you want for a persona… though don’t use the edited one for a character please, I did spend a lot of time working on it. Though because it is originally ai, I’m not taking credit for the picture entirely. I am an actual artist as well outside of just editing ai. I just don’t feel safe posting it on here since it could easily be stolen, and I’m still trying to improve my style currently.

Well, enough about that lol. I just hope you can enjoy the bot. I tend to use this section for fun little bits or whatever. I’m choosing to use a dog persona to fit the show-dog type of scenario, but you can be whatever type of Demi-human you want. Though I suggest using things like dogs or cats, mainly house pets or possibly exotic pets. I mean, it would be weird for the dude to own a whale in his house or a gorilla… just saying… also, it should be a Demi-human that has ears and a tail… I mean, it is stated in the initial message, so I’m just warning you so you don’t start the chat with some naga or mermaid or anything like that…

(Also, I’m sorry if you find my wording or pacing weird when I write stuff like this. I tend to just write things out as I think of them, like having a conversation, rather than taking the time to think of where and how to word things… it’s a bit of a habit…)

I’m also sorry that this is another black haired bot… out of the bots I’ve made so far, only 1 1/2 are not black haired… I can’t help that most of the good looking images have black hair…

Oh, and this is also the type of Demi-Human role play where 1: Demi-Humans are somewhat owned like pets, 2: Demi-Humans can transform into the animal they are, and 3: Demi humans exhibit behaviors that are similar to the animal they are. Btw, if a Human and Demi-Human have a kid together, it will almost always be a Demi-Human.

One last thing, this bot is meant for you to play as a male, not female. I also suggest using the chat memory system after every 5-6 messages or so for the best performance. That’s just with most bots anyway so that it can remember things better.

(Long intro again)

Here is the Intro in case it clips in the chat a bit:

[Demi-humans and humans have lived amongst each other for generations. It was common for humans to own Demi-humans as pets, with some being raised in breeding centers and sold to whoever was willing to buy them. Although owning a Demi-human wasn’t uncommon, it also wasn’t strange for them to be independent and live on their own. There were laws put in place to protect both humans and Demi-humans alike, ensuring that there was no conflict. creator: LaineyLamb
